summary: First test iteration for Nidhii. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed covering auth (signup/login/me/duplicates/admin role), reports CRUD (mine/filters/admin-only/verify increments points + idempotent), stats (overview/weekly/leaderboard), chat (Gemini en+hi with session continuity), IVR start/step + invalid digit, voice transcribe (empty body 400, no auth 401), CSV exports (admin-only with proper headers). Frontend: Landing renders with Sign In/Join Nidhii, signup→dashboard works, admin login shows /admin tab with Reports CSV + Users CSV buttons + Verify/Reject buttons (3 pending, 1 verified visible), IVR page accepts dial pad 1800643444, language switcher to Hindi works, Call connects and IVR Hindi prompt is shown, pressing 1 returns 'You selected Water' prompt, Sahayak chat sends English and Hindi messages and receives properly localized AI replies persisted to DB. NewReport page has all expected testids (type-water/energy/waste/other, report-location, report-description, report-submit, voice-card, start-recording-btn). All routes Protected wrapper works.

minor.issue: Reward bonus (+₹10 every 25th verified report) is computed using user.points % 25 == 0; however this fires whenever points becomes a multiple of 25 for ANY status transition to 'verified', including admin re-verification of an already-verified report. The verify handler already guards points-increment behind 'prev_status != verified', but the rewards check uses the post-increment points value for the first-time verification only — which is correct. However if a status flips verified→rejected→verified later, points would increment again and could re-trigger reward at 25/50/etc. Consider tracking lifetime_verified count separately to avoid double rewards on flip-flops.

Day buckets compare against ISO datetime strings as lex sort; works because timezone is consistently UTC and produced by now_iso(), but if any legacy doc has a non-ISO timestamp the bucket will silently miss it.
Imports OpenAISpeechToText lazily; if package missing returns 500 'Whisper unavailable' (acceptable) but no health-probe endpoint surfaces this readiness.

design_issues.screen: Dashboard / Reports (any page with weekly chart)
issues: Recharts console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. ResponsiveContainer parent has no defined min-height/width on first paint. Add minHeight (e.g., 240px) or fixed aspect ratio to avoid the noisy warning and very brief 0-size flash.

action_items: Optional: Wrap Recharts charts with explicit minHeight to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warnings.
Optional: Track lifetime_verified count on user to make reward accrual fully idempotent across status flip-flops.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~440 lines with auth, reports, stats, chat, voice, ivr, admin export co-located. Acceptable for MVP but should be split into routers (auth.py, reports.py, stats.py, chat.py, ivr.py, admin.py) before next feature drop.
Reward logic relies on points modulo 25 which is fragile if points ever decrement; recommend a dedicated counter.
/api/auth/me does not refresh points after verify; client must explicitly re-fetch — confirmed working in tests but ensure UI revalidates after admin verify.
JWT secret has fallback 'dev'; in prod this is set. Good.
All env vars sourced correctly; no hardcoded URLs in backend; frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via axios in /lib/api.js (verified).
MongoDB _id excluded everywhere via projection {_id: 0} — clean.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (landing, login admin+resident, signup, admin verify+CSV visible, IVR dial+language+prompt, Sahayak chat en+hi)

test_credentials: Resident asha@example.com / pass1234, Admin admin@example.com / admin123 (both pre-existing and confirmed working).
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_-prefixed reports were created during the verify_increments_points test and one TEST_FE_ resident account during signup flow test. None were cleaned up; safe to leave as they don't affect pass/fail and are easy to filter by 'TEST_' prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 24 pytest cases pass. Use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py as regression. Frontend route is /new-report (not /reports/new). NewReport testids are type-{water|energy|waste|other}, report-location, report-description, report-submit, voice-card, start-recording-btn. IVR virtual number is 1800643444 (use page.click for each digit testid dial-N). Chat page exposes chat-input, chat-send, chat-language, chat-messages, chat-mic. Admin page has export-reports, export-users, and verify-* / reject-* per row. Mic-dependent voice tests skip safely in headless. Recharts logs harmless width(-1) warnings — do not chase as a bug.
